title: The monday.com AI hackathon is coming up and you’re invited to join us!
excerpt:
Hi everyone! 
We’ve just announced the monday.com AI Assistant which will enhance how customers interact and build on the monday.com WorkOS and support various use cases. Today, we’re excited to invite developers to enha…

posts.author: OrFrid (Or Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

We’ve just announced the monday.com AI Assistant which will enhance how customers interact and build on the monday.com WorkOS and support various use cases. Today, we’re excited to invite developers to enhance the capabilities of the monday AI Assistant and build apps for our app marketplace.
The details: June 20-22, 2023 in Tel Aviv, New York, London, and online. Want to learn more and apply? Click here.

Let us know if you have any questions!

posts.author: akshay (Akshay Akula)
posts.cookedHtml:
Super Excited for this! Although I do have some questions regarding when to start working on this.

  • Is this going to be like last year’s hackathon, where there is a longer working window (>1 month)?
  • Am I allowed to begin work and ideation right now, or should I wait to do it all during the event time window?

posts.author: OrFrid (Or Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey!

We will release the new infrastructure to create AI app features only before the hackathon, but we will provide more details to the participants in the upcoming weeks.
You can already think on ideas for your upcoming cool apps!

Hope it helps,
Or

posts.author: Aniket_Katre3 (Aniket)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Fridman,

Thanks for sharing details!

I would like to know more details about this monday.com AI hackathon. How do we participate or any pre-requisite we need to do before this session.

I already register for hackathon and Super excited. Need more info. like how do we share our ideas for this AI application or any different windows from there we can take update or share our own ideas and our own MyApp Application need to be submitted?

Appreciate your response!
Thanks, in advance!

posts.author: OrFrid (Or Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml:
All details are here @manikanta6264 !

Lab Lab

The monday.com AI app hackathon

🔥 3 days to create your app 🌐 Join the hack in London, New York, Tel Aviv and virtual on lablab.ai 🤝 Build alone, or create your team on lablab.ai 🚀 Have the opportunity to go-to-market and grow your product on the monday app marketplace 📌 Each team...
